description: oh-my-claude-code-slim: orchestrator-gated hooks. UserPromptSubmit injects the scheduler phase reminder each turn; PostToolUse (Read|Write|Edit) re-injects it at most once per turn after direct file work; PreToolUse (Agent|Task) denies spawning anything but the five plugin specialists; PreToolUse (EnterPlanMode) denies orchestrator-initiated Plan Mode (frontmatter disallowedTools is not applied to a main-thread --agent session). All fire only when the active agent is the plugin orchestrator (default sessions and subagents are unaffected); OMCC_SLIM_DISABLE=1 silences everything.；SessionStart 在 ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL 指向 8318 时自动拉起 omcc-router 模型分流器
